summary: Completed comprehensive testing of CityBlend filter parameters, modern UI redesign, and PWA support. All 37 backend tests pass. Frontend filter drawer, category switching, map view, and bottom navigation all working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: max_distance filter (1km, 5km, 10km, 25km, 50km, 100km) - all working
Backend: min_rating filter (3+, 3.5+, 4+, 4.5+) - filters correctly
Backend: max_price filter - returns only places at or below price level
Backend: min_price filter - returns only places at or above price level
Backend: sort_by=distance - places sorted by distance ascending
Backend: sort_by=rating - places sorted by rating descending
Backend: sort_by=price - places sorted by price ascending
Backend: Combined filters work together correctly
PWA: manifest.json loads with correct name, display, icons
PWA: icon-192.png loads (200 OK, image/png)
PWA: icon-512.png loads (200 OK, image/png)
PWA: theme_color and background_color set correctly
Frontend: Landing page loads with modern minimalist design
Frontend: Home page loads with place cards
Frontend: Filter button opens filter drawer
Frontend: Filter drawer shows all radius options (1km-100km)
Frontend: Filter drawer shows rating options (Any, 3+, 3.5+, 4+, 4.5+)
Frontend: Filter drawer shows price range options (Free, $, $$, $$$, $$$$)
Frontend: Filter drawer shows Open Now option
Frontend: Filter drawer shows sort options (Relevance, Distance, Rating, Price)
Frontend: Applying filters updates results and radius display
Frontend: Category switching works (For You, Eat, Drink, Culture, etc.)
Frontend: Map view toggle works - shows map with place markers
Frontend: Feed view toggle works - shows place cards
Frontend: Bottom navigation works (Explore, Greens, Saved, Profile)
Frontend: FeedCard shows rating, price, distance, open/closed status
Frontend: FeedCard shows walk time and drive time
Frontend: Greens page shows 9,523 strains and 2,334 spots
Frontend: Profile page shows user taste profile
Frontend: Saved page shows empty state correctly
seed_data_creation: Created test user with onboarding_completed=true and taste_profile for authenticated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new filter parameters (max_distance, min_rating, min_price, max_price, sort_by) are working correctly in backend. Frontend filter drawer opens and applies filters. PWA manifest and icons load correctly. Modern minimalist UI redesign is complete with neutral gray color scheme. Test user created in MongoDB for authenticated testing.

filter_parameters.max_distance: Working - filters places by radius (1km to 100km)
filter_parameters.min_rating: Working - filters places with rating >= specified value
filter_parameters.min_price: Working - filters places with price_level >= specified value
filter_parameters.max_price: Working - filters places with price_level <= specified value

pwa_support.manifest: Working - loads with correct PWA fields

ui_redesign.landing_page: Modern minimalist design with neutral grays
ui_redesign.home_page: Clean feed cards with filter drawer
ui_redesign.bottom_nav: Updated design with Explore, Greens, Saved, Profile
